profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Yelooo Integra Datanet Tbk engages in leasing communication technology equipment in Indonesia. The company offers tour and travel services, as well as trade in communication equipment. It also sells mobile phones, prepaid vouchers, electronic phone credit, and internet data packages. In addition, the company engages in trading activities; and provides information and communication, industry processing, professional, scientific, construction, printing, and technical services. PT Yelooo Integra Datanet Tbk was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Yelooo Integra Datanet Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Artalindo Semesta Nusantara.
